{{Infobox character
| name = Ornheim Incarnation
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|mountainous strength, summoned golems}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Ornheim Incarnation]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valinhall]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valinhall]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

''See also: [[Ornheim Incarnation Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim]] [[Incarnation]] is a massive, stone-based entity standing approximately nine to ten feet tall. Constructed from fine white stone characterized by multicolored veins, the creature possesses a highly detailed appearance resembling an elderly man. Unlike traditional golems that feature gemstone eyes, this being has disturbingly realistic human eyes capable of expressing intense anger. The [[Incarnation]] exhibits significant physical power, demonstrated by its ability to toss individuals aside easily and engage in combat with strength comparable to [[Tartarus]]. During conflict, it can manifest spinning rocks that strike like shooting stars and wield a red-and-black [[sword]]. The entity also possesses unique elemental properties, such as the ability to cause stone to grow around it or create smaller, man-shaped golems from the ground.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim]] [[Incarnation]] is a towering stone creature that takes the appearance of an older man. His body is composed of fine white stone featuring pale skin marked by multicolored, marble-like veins that run through him in every color. Possessing mountainous strength, the entity eventually departed from [[Valinhall]]. During his journey, he utilized his power to summon golems.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim Incarnation]] is a stone creature that looks like an older man.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim Incarnation]] is made of fine white stone with multicolored lines.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim Incarnation]] has pale stone skin with colorful marble-like veins.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim Incarnation]] possesses mountainous strength.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim Incarnation]] left [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim Incarnation]] has veins of every color running through him.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim Incarnation]] is a towering entity.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ornheim Incarnation]] summoned golems.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
